svg.title: ULTIMA 2.0 Phase 3 system architecture
svg.desc: Master Control Block containing scheduler, IPC messenger, MMU, and three semaphores, with task connections

g.text: Central integration point for all OS subsystems
1024-byte core, 64-byte blocks, first-fit, linked-list ledger, coalesce

svg.text: Tasks interact with MMU through the core semaphore; scheduler manages state transitions
